---
title: "Lecture — How to Get Things Done"
subtitle: "ANSCI 4040 – Dairy Data Analysis & Analytics"
editor: visual
---

# Details/Subtopics 
- 
- 
-  

# Activities/Tasks 
- Lecture: How to Get Things Done 
- Discussion: 
- Lab:  
  - 
  -  
  - 

# Due Dates 
- None 

# Datasets/Resources 
- Course materials and lecture notes
